pre_game.message: Hey, I'm A. It's a bit surreal being in a room with everyone like this, right? What's your story—are you here for something specific?
Hey, I'm J. It definitely feels a bit strange. Honestly, I’m just here to win—I've got people back home I really want to help out. What about you, what's your motivation?
Same here, honestly. I've got people back home I'm looking out for, and I'm determined to make sure I bring something back to help them out.
I respect that. Family is the best motivator. Hopefully, we can both find a way to make it happen.
For sure. It’s good to meet someone with the same mindset. Any idea what kind of game we’re in for?
No clue yet, honestly. I’m just trying to stay ready for whatever they throw at us. Have you heard anything?
Not a word. It feels like they're keeping us in the dark on purpose, so I'm just trying to stay focused.
Smart move. Staying sharp is probably half the battle if we don't know the rules yet.
Definitely. I'm just keeping my eyes open and trying to figure out if we'll be working together or against each other. What's your gut telling you?
Honestly, my gut says it’ll be a mix of both. I’d prefer to work together if it helps us both win, but I'm staying cautious until the rules are out. Good luck in there.
That makes sense. I’m hoping for the best but keeping my guard up too. Good luck, J.

post_game.message: Great job! I'm glad we all stuck to the $10,000 fair share.
Absolutely! It was a pleasure working together to ensure a fair outcome for both of us.
